subcodes.first_line: O ye sincere ones, O ye steadfast ones, O ye enraptured souls! I render thanks unto God for having preserved you within the shelter of His protection [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها المخلصون ایها الثابتون ایها المنجذبون اننی اشکر الله بما حفظکم فی صون حمایته
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @Shrines and Holy places, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
